zh.lifeSummary: Ede West於1552年出生在英國哈普爾惠維爾。她於1573年2月22日與Hugh Thorne在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ede West于1552年出生在英国哈普爾惠維爾。她于1573年2月22日与Hugh Thorne在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Ede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Ede West was born in 1552, in Wherwell, Hampshire, England. She married Hugh Thorne on 22 February 1573, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in Pitminster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Ede West est née en 1552, à Wherwell, Hampshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Hugh Thorne le 22 février 1573, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Ede West wurde 1552 in Wherwell, Hampshire, England geboren. Sie hat am 22. Februar 1573 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Hugh Thorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb in Pitminster, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Ede West è nata il nel 1552 nel Wherwell, Hampshire, England. Lei sposato Hugh Thorne il 22 febbraio 1573, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel Pitminster, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ede Westは1552年にイギリスハンプシュアイアウアーウエルで生まれた。1573年2月22日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンでHugh Thorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ede West(은)는 1552년 영국 함프실르 화웰에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1573년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 Hugh Thorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ede West nasceu em 1552, em Wherwell, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Hugh Thorne em 22 de fevereiro de 1573, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Ede West родилась в 1552 г. в местности уирвелл, хампшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Thorne 22 февраля 1573 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Ede West nació en 1552, en Wherwell, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Hugh Thorne el 22 de febrero de 1573, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra.
